posts.title: May 3rd English Notes
posts.text: 1,complicated ->sophisticated As Artificial Intelligence becomes increasingly there are growing concerns that robots could become athreat.随着人工智能变得越来越复杂，人们越来越担心机器人会成为人类的威胁。 2,Tears became more than a biological necessity to lubricate the eye and developed into a sign of intense emotion and a signal of social bonding. 眼泪不仅仅是润滑眼睛的生物必需品，更是发展成了一种强烈的情感符号和社会纽带的信号。 3,pensioner 退休人员 4，text发短信 5,settlement协议书，divorce ~离婚协议 6，divorced 有分歧的 7，不赞成（观点）do not subscribe to 8，permit admit 9，capital formation 集资 10，undergraduate大学生 11,an artistic temperament 艺术气质 12，劝告律师 nv 13，ignite点燃 14，a chain reaction of一连串 15，grade an essay评分 Advanced Expression1,good way/method –> the elixir of 灵丹妙药 persistence in reading and writing keeps the elixir of language learning 2，release the traffic jams –> alleviate gain comfort from friends may alleviate our wounded heart 3, avoid an escalating trade war that makes economic engagement between China and the West impossible 避免不断升级的贸易战导致西方和中国之间的经济往来无法继续 4,try to do –>give sth a shot 5,don’t need –> dispense with sth //abandon –>do away with //abolish,destroy 6,have much further to go 还有很长的路要走；距离目标还很远 Robot technology has much further to go if the machines are to replace human carers.要取代人类护工，机器人技术还有很长的路要走。 7,plenty of scope for sth 某事有发挥/增长空间 In the medium-term, economists say there is plenty of scope for China to maintain relatively high growth rates. 经济学家称，中期而言，中国保持相对高增长的空间很大。/room/place 8,sth is natural part of sth. …是…自然的一部分 Stress is a natural part of everyday life.压力是日常生活的一部分。 such churn is a natural part of rising prosperity这种剧烈变动是的走向富足一个必经之路 9,take a heavy toll on sth对…造成不好影响 Frequent move took a toll on children’s performance.经常搬家影响了孩子的成绩。
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 29th English Notes
posts.text: 1,despair 绝望 desperate 急需要，渴望，铤而走险，极困难 2，And so for the moment on this island we are witnesses to the beginning, as it were, of the pollution of our environment.因此，目前在这个岛上，不妨说我们是环境开始受到污染的见证人。 3，Administrative staff may be deskilled through increased automation and efficiency. （减低(某工作)的技术要求）随着自动化程度和效率的不断提高，对管理人员的技能要求可能会大大降低。 4，examine a witness 询问证人（目击者，证据，证人） 5，a desperate shortage奇缺，急切的 6，the irony of fate 7,the witness box 证人席 8，mounting despair adj.上升的;增长的 There is mounting evidence of serious effects on people’s health. 有越来越多的证据表明对人的健康有严重影响。 mounting excitement/concern/tension 越来越兴奋 / 关注 / 紧张 If you hide away your problems and pretend that they don’t exist they will just continue to mount up… 如果你把问题藏起来，假装它们不存在，问题只会越积越多。 9,frantic crowds 疯狂的人群 紧张忙乱的；手忙脚乱的 10，photo-centric websites 以图片为主的网站 11，motor 马达，汽车，汽车的，有引擎的 12，operate at near capacity 接近全力运转 13，hammock 吊床 14，as though=as if 15,set out 安排，陈述，说明，陈列，摆放 Set out the cakes attractively, using lacy doilies.网眼的蕾丝的，甜品网眼垫 铺上网眼垫纸，将蛋糕摆得诱人些。 He has written a letter to The Times setting out his views… 他已经给《泰晤士报》去信阐明自己的观点。 16,the figures for the growth of … represent the proportional growth of … 17,underemployment就业不足 18，indicate 表明 19，comet慧星 tail and generally fuzzy 狭长，通常模糊 20，veteran经验丰富的人;老手;退伍军人
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 28th English Notes
posts.text: 1,gross 总的；毛的 being the total amount of sth before anything is taken away gross weight (= including the container or wrapping) 毛重 严重的 very obvious and unacceptable gross indecency/negligence/misconduct 严重猥亵 / 过失 / 渎职 令人不快的；令人恶心的；使人厌恶的very unpleasant 粗鲁的肥胖丑陋的· 同义词： disgusting ‘He ate it with mustard.’ ‘Oh, gross!’“他用芥末拌着吃。”“啊，真恶心！” 2，gross profift / the net profit 毛利/净利润 3，hide and seek 4，courteous有礼貌的；客气的；（尤指）恭敬的，谦恭的 5,resource allocation 6,seek a second opinion 寻求他人的意见 7，be considerate of others为他人着想 8，paint in water-colors 9. 充满活力的；果断的；精力充沛的very active, determined or full of energy 同义词： energetic a vigorous campaign against tax fraud 坚决打击骗税的运动 Take vigorous exercise for several hours a week. 每周做几个小时剧烈运动。 身强体壮的 10，not only->not just 11,fix for them to … 安排他们去 12，worn用坏的;用旧的;磨薄的 13，link（链状物的）环，节，圈each ring of a chain 14，toad 蟾蜍 15，non-fiction纪实文学 16，routine 日常的，常规的，例行的 17，a tourist resort 观光胜地 a summer resort 避暑胜地 18,leave a tip付小费 receive a tip收小费 19，put up with忍受 keep up with跟上，不落人之后; 对…消息灵通; 保持接触; 20，fiscal财政的 21，peak hours高峰时间 22，speed things along 加快进度 23，deliver 发表；宣布；发布to give a speech, talk, etc. or other official statement 履行诺言；不负所望；兑现 ​ She always delivers on her promises.她总是信守诺言。 助产；接生to help a woman to give birth to a baby The baby was delivered by Caesarean section.这个婴儿是剖腹产下的。 24，milligram 毫克 25，broader picture 大局，整体情况 26,That might be in your favor. 那个你可能会喜欢。If the truth is in your favor no one will believe you. 如果真相对你有利，没人会信你。 27,a flood of 28,concede承认 29,run conter to …与~背道而驰,与。。冲突 30，freight货物 31，interstate 州际的n.(美国)州际公路 32，last leg of the journey 最后一段行程 33，spontaneous即兴的，自发的
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 26th English Notes
posts.text: 1，hold the principle of mutual benefit.坚持互利原则 2，I was overwhelmed with longing for those innocent days of early childhood.我内心充满着对纯真童年早期时光的怀念。 3,strive for 争取… 4，to pick up where we left off last time 接着上次的地方接着继续讲 5，perform surgery 进行手术 6，discipline 学科科目 7，clear up the confusion 8,No comment 9,cling to ideal 10,Rather, we would not have been likely to spend enough time getting to know each other due to the lack of immediately visible mutual interests.相反，由于缺乏立即可见的共同利益，我们不可能花足够的时间彼此了解。 11,a illness confined him to bed for several months 一种病让他卧床数月 12，it was been favorably commented by the audience 13,discipline myself to exercise 坚持锻炼 14，revolution revolutionary revolve evolve evolution evolutionary involve revolution [C, U] 革命 an attempt, by a large number of people, to change the government of a country, especially by violent action a socialist revolution 社会主义革命 变革 A revolution in information technology is taking place.信息技术正在发生巨变。 （天体）旋转 *revolutionary[usually before noun] * 革命的 connected with political revolution a revolutionary leader革命领袖 巨变的；突破性的 a revolutionary idea 独出心裁的想法 （支持）改革者；（尤指）革命者 revolve [V] 旋转；环绕；转动 to go in a circle around a central point The fan revolved slowly.电扇缓慢地转动着。 evolove ~ (sth) (from sth) (into sth) （使）逐渐形成，逐步发展，逐渐演变 to develop gradually, especially from a simple to a more complicated form; to develop sth in this way Each school must evolve its own way of working. 每个学校必须形成自己的办学方式。 进化 evolution 进化;演变;发展;渐进 In politics Britain has preferred evolution to revolution (= gradual development to sudden violent change) . 英国在政治上喜欢渐进而不喜欢革命。 evolutionary 进化的；演变的；逐渐发展的connected with evolution ; connected with gradual development and change evolutionary theory进化论 involve 涉及 包含；需要；使成为必然部分（或结果）；牵连；影响if a situation, an event or an activity involves sth, that thing is an important or necessary part or result of it 同义词： entail [VN] Any investment involves an element of risk. 任何投资都有一定的风险。 15,relate relative relation relevant (注意拼写) relate 联系 叙述；讲述；讲（故事）to give a spoken or written report of sth; to tell a story [VN] She relates her childhood experiences in the first chapters. 在开始的几章中，她描述了自己童年的经历。 relative 相比较而言的；比较的considered and judged by being compared with sth else the relative merits of the two plans 相比较之下两个计划各自的优点 相对的；相关联的considered according to its position or connection with sth else the position of the sun relative to the earth 太阳与地球的相对位置 相比之下存在（或有）的that exists or that has a particular quality only when compared with sth else 同义词： comparative They now live in relative comfort (= compared with how they lived before) . 他们现在过得比较舒适。 关于（或涉及到）…的having a connection with sth; referring to sth the facts relative to the case 与这个案件有关的事实 亲戚；亲属 relation also have this meaning relavent 紧密相关的；切题的 These comments are not directly relevant to this enquiry. 这些意见与这项调查没有直接联系。 有价值的；有意义的 having ideas that are valuable and useful to people in their lives and work Her novel is still relevant today. 她的小说今天仍有现实意义。 16，Built with safety in mind 考虑到安全 17，On occasions it is the fear that certain disclosures may be unacceptable to family or friends that motivates an individual to seek professional help.有时候，正是因为担心自己吐露的某些消息可能无法被家人或朋友接受，才促使一个人寻求专业帮助。 18，Sometimes a new technology doesn’t drive the old one out, but only parts of it while forcing the rest to evolve.有时候，一项新技术不会消除旧技术，而只是使其部分消亡，同时迫使其余部分演变发展。 19，shift轮班
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 19th English Notes
posts.text: Sentences 1,The popularity of the cellphones,along with the mobility and intimacy,will futher accelerate these trends of the lifestyle changes.手机的普及以及移动性和亲密性将进一步加速这些生活方式改变的趋势。 2，In recent decades，the foreign cultures，along with the infiltration of western culture is being exported directly to our country,and it is increasingly apparent that this transfer will lead to a disaster,unless we donnot take ethnic traditional culture seriously.近几十年来，随着西方文化的渗透，外国文化被直接出口到我国，除非我们不认真对待民族传统文化，否则这种转移将导致灾难，这一点越来越明显。 3,Gone are to the… ···不复存在 4,every day that we insist to study puts a step closer to fluecy,eloquence and a good command of language我们学习的每一天都离流畅、雄辩和良好的语言能力更近了一步 5,文章善用被动语态if light is needed for life to form 6,Given new techniques,…,meaning…
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 14th English Notes
posts.text: words 1. greet - 对…作出反应 to react to sb/sth in a particular way - 映入…的眼帘to be the first thing that you see, hear or smell >Our help was greeted with appreciation. 受到了感谢 prompt 立即；迅速的；准时的 done without delay 促使；导致 to be the first thing that you see, hear or smell 提示，提醒，提词 to encourage sb to speak by asking them questions or suggesting words that they could say Prompt action was required as the fire spread.立即采取行动His speech prompted an angry outburst from a man激起了一男子的愤怒The program will prompt you to enter data where required.提醒你输入数据。 popularization 普及 engage 吸引住（注意力、兴趣） to succeed in attracting and keeping sb’s attention and interest 雇用；聘用 employ sb to do a particular job engage in sth 从事，参加 engage in the activities It is a picturesque scenery place that engages us. 这是一个风景如画的地方，吸引了我们。He is currently engaged as a consultant.他现在受雇为顾问。 justify 证实 ask for evidence to justify your bleak view sector 领域行业 claim 宣称，索要， & proclaim 宣布，表明 to say that sth is true although it has not been proved and other people may not believe it to publicly and officially tell people about sth important identical 相同的 ideological 意识形态的 whatsoever (用于名词词组后，加强否定陈述)丝毫，任何，无论什么 There’s no reason whatsoever to turn down this suggestion.没有任何理由拒绝这个建议。 back 支持 back up phrases 1. could do with 需要 Teens could do with the edification and moralization of the traditional culture from the ancient poetry 青少年需要从古诗词中得到对传统文化的熏陶和教化。 problems have been multiplying 成倍增加
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 11th English Notes
posts.text: vocabulary 1,hypotheses n假说，假设;(凭空的)猜想 an idea which is suggested as a possible explanation for a particular situation or condition, but which has not yet been proved to be correct.2,ideal n理想，完美的人或事3,tempering n回火（炼钢）tempering of the reality 现实的磨炼4，argue 论证；说理to give reasons why you think that sth is right/wrong, true/not true, etc., especially to persuade people that you are right5,context 背景，上下文，语境6，intervention 干涉;干预7，recession 经济衰退;退后;撤回 the impact of the current recession on manufacturing时下经济萎缩对制造业的影响 8,undertake 承担;从事;承诺to make yourself responsible for sth and start doing itto agree or promise that you will do sth to undertake a task/projectHe undertook to finish the job by Friday.他答应星期五或之前完成这一工作。 9,slightly a little I knew her slightly. slender 苗条的;细的;窄的;微薄的;不足的 her slender figure 她苗条的身材 10,flourish v繁荣,昌盛,茁壮成长;健康幸福;(为引起注意)挥舞to develop quickly and be successful or commonn.令人难忘的方式;华丽辞藻an impressive act or way of doing sth if our economy is to flourish 如果我们的经济要繁荣 11,succeed 接替；继任；随后出现 Who succeeded Kennedy as President?接替肯尼迪任总统的是谁？ 12,elimate 消除 if the poverty is to be elimated 如果要消除贫困 13，well-being 健康幸福快乐 Singing can create a sense of wellbeing…唱歌能够给人一种心旷神怡的感觉。 14,Millennium [mɪˈleniəm] 一千年;千周年纪念日;千禧年15,declaration 公告宣告 ~of a war; the Declaration of Independence16,agency a government department that provides a particular service17,gathering n.聚集;聚会;集会;收集v.聚集;集合;召集;收拢(分散的东西);搜集 the twenty-second annual gathering of the South Pacific Forum.第22届南太平洋论坛年会 18,indicator 指示信号;迹象;指示器;指针;方向灯a sign that shows you what sth is like or how a situation is changing The economic indicators are better than expected.经济指标比预期的好。 19,tease v.取笑;戏弄;挑逗，撩拨(异性)n.爱戏弄人的人;逗弄者;取笑者;戏弄;捉弄;勾引人者 tease out 套出，巧妙获得（信息或答案）he was sure he could tease it out if only he had time. 他肯定，只要他有时间就一定能弄个清楚。tease out the answers 套出答案 20,degradation 堕落;潦倒(的境况);a situation in which sb has lost all self-respect and the respect of other people 毁坏，恶化(过程)the process of something becoming worse or weaker, or being made worse or weaker. the degradation of being sent to prison 被关进监狱的落泊境况environmental degradation 环境恶化 21,derive v.获得;(使)起源;(使)产生derive pleasure from helping others 助人为乐be derived from sth 起源于；来自 ‘politics’ is derived from a Greek word ‘politics’一词源自希腊语 22,propotion 部分;比例;倍数关系;均衡 a large proportion of 一大部分The proportion of men to women 男女比例 23, grind 磨碎;磨快;磨光n.令人疲劳(或厌倦)的工作;苦差事;刺耳的摩擦声 to grind coffee/corn将咖啡 / 谷粒磨成粉 24,case n具体情况;事例;事实;特殊情况;案件；容器;论据a particular situation or a situation of a particular type In some cases 在某些情况下the true situationIf that is the case (= if the situation described is true) 如果真是那样a situation that relates to a particular person or thingIn your case, we are prepared to be lenient.根据你的情况，我们可以从宽处理。a murder case 案件the case for the defence/prosecution 有利于被告 / 原告的论据 25,graphic 图案的;形象的，生动的，逼真的(尤指令人不快的事物) 图表very clear and full of details, especially about sth unpleasant a graphic account/description of a battle 对战斗的生动叙述 / 描述He kept telling us about his operation, in the most graphic detail .他不停地向我们绘声绘色地讲述他动手术的详细情况。 26,discernible 看得清的;辨别得出的you can see it or recognize that it exists Far away the outline of the island is just discernible…远处，岛屿轮廓仅依稀可辨。 27,acrossacross our diverse planet 在我们这个多元化的星球上across a dozens of environment issue 在许多环境问题上28,improvement 改善，改进 phrases >1,Residence among the poor **is suggested as** a way of understanding their problems. >有人提出与穷人同住是了解他们问题的一种办法。 2,sow the seeds I sow the seed in pots of soil-based compost. 我把种子种在几盆掺有堆肥的土里。 3,grind to a halt 逐渐停止;慢慢瘫痪;（车辆）声音刺耳地缓缓停下 In winter they almost grind to a halt. 到了冬天，它们会停止活动。 He cites capacitors and connectors, without which much of the modern world would grind to a halt. 他举了电容器和连接器的例子，没有这两样产品，现代世界将大面积陷入停顿。 4,better off 境况（尤指经济性）较好的 He’s much better off than before. 他手头比过去宽多了。
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 8th English Notes
posts.text: 1, concerns2, a memorial service3, tap water 自来水4, fuel the “walking on eggshells”feeling 加剧了“如履薄冰”的感觉5, aside 在旁边 She pulled the curtain aside. sweep aside sweep human rights aside 对人权置之不顾 6, articles of the contract 合同条款contract a project 承包工程contract for 承办 7, arrange for 安排8, training are increasingly important as the body ages9, general practice 全科诊所10, improve fuel efficiency and perfect(使完美) hybrid(混合动力) vehicles11, commodity 商品;有用的东西12, work out a solution 制定13, offer onself to the state 为国献身14, add fuel to 加油 v fuel15, the Stock Exchange 证券交易所16, exchange greetings 寒暄17, a side dish 配菜18, meet the criteria 符合标准19, ongoing 进行中的 an ongoing debate The police investigation is ongoing. 20, conlusive evidence 确凿证据21, scrutinize 仔细查看;认真检查;The statement was carefully scrutinized before publication.声明在发表前经过仔细审查。22, observational 观察的，观测的23, randomize 使随机化；（使）作任意排列24, dietary 饮食的;有关饮食的;the dietary habits 饮食习惯25, apparently 据…所知;看来;显然 according to what you have heard or read; according to the way sth appearsYou use apparently to indicate that the information you are giving is something that you have heard, but you are not certain that it is true. Apparently they are getting divorced soon.看样子，他们很快就要离婚。Apparently the girls are not at all amused by the whole business…据说女孩们觉得整件事情一点也不好笑。
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.slug: 数据库原理中函数依赖，函数依赖集，属性集闭包
posts.path: 2020/04/04/数据库原理中函数依赖，函数依赖集，属性集闭包/
posts.text: 理论准备：Armstrong公理F1(自反性)：若x包含y，xy都被F包含，则F逻辑蕴涵X→Y;F2(增广性): 若X→Y为F所蕴涵，则XZ→YZ为F所蕴涵；F3(传递性): 若X→Y,Y→Z为F所蕴涵，则X→Z为F所蕴涵；F4(伪增性)：若X→Y，W≥Z(表W包含Z）为F所蕴涵，则XW→YZ为F所蕴涵；—————（XZ→YZ,Z换成更大的W）F5(伪传性): 若X→Y，YW→Z为F所蕴涵, 则XW→Z为F所蕴涵；（增广加传递）F6(合成性): 若X→Y,X→Z为F所蕴涵，则X→YZ为F所蕴涵；F7(分解性): 若X→Y,Z≤Y (表Z包含于Y）为F所蕴涵，则X→Z为F所蕴涵。 F:函数依赖集U:属性集U={A1,A2,…,An}R(U):属性集上面的一个关系模式 蕴涵&逻辑蕴涵： 蕴涵：A蕴含B,记为”A→B”逻辑蕴涵：1，例：关系模式 R=(A,B,C),函数依赖集F={A→B,B→C}, F逻辑蕴涵A→C 闭包&属性（集）闭包 1，闭包：若F为关系模式R(U)的函数依赖集，我们把F以及所有被F逻辑蕴涵的函数依赖的集合称为F的闭包，记为F+即：F+={X→Y|X→Y∈F∨“应用Armstong公理从F中导出的任何X→Y”} 2，F+，里面的元素是函数依赖（就是X→Y这种东西）XF+，里面的元素是属性，这些属性是F根据Armstrong 公理推导出来的(定义: 设关系模式R(U，F )，U 为其属性集，F 为其函数依赖集，则称在所有用Armstrong 公理从F 推出的函数依赖X → Ai 中，Ai 的属性集合为X 的属性闭包。) 一个重要的定理：X→Y属于F+，等价于Y属于XF+。X,Y都是U中的属性。（引理4） 覆盖 F+=G+ 等价于F包含于G+且G包含于F+，称F和G是等价的，也称F覆盖G或者G覆盖F。证明： 引理5的证明 为验证F、G是否等价，需要对任一X→Y属于F+检验是否X→Y属于G+, 由引理4可将这种检验转为是否Y是否属于X关于F的闭包由此可将求F+这种不容易完成的事转为容易完成的事，即求属性闭包。 属性闭包的计算算法求属性闭包的目的是为了判断一个函数依赖是否被一个F所蕴涵 最小覆盖 就是F中去掉某个函数依赖后如果还是和原来的等价，就可以把这个函数依赖删除，执行完后，剩下的函数依赖集合是最小覆盖
posts.author: Leo Schopen

posts.title: April 2nd English Notes
posts.excerpt: 4.1 1，adhere 黏附; 附着 adhere to sth (formal) 坚持，遵守，遵循（法律、规章、指示、信念等） For ten months he adhered to a strict no-fat low-salt diet.十个月来他严格坚持无脂肪少盐饮食。
posts.text: 4.1 1，adhere 黏附; 附着 adhere to sth (formal) 坚持，遵守，遵循（法律、规章、指示、信念等） For ten months he adhered to a strict no-fat low-salt diet.十个月来他严格坚持无脂肪少盐饮食。 2，dosage 剂量 a high dosage of vitamin C 3，practitioner (尤指医学或法律界的)从业人员;习艺者;专门人才 dental practitioners 牙医4，otherwise 否则，除此以外 We’re committed to the project. We wouldn&#39;t be here otherwise.否则我们就不会到这里来了5，encounter 遭遇，遇到，邂逅 encountered such resistance 遇到过这么大的阻力 6，be at risk for you may be at risk for heart disease 你可能有心脏病的风险 7，Samoa 萨摩亚群岛（太平洋） 8，Epidemiology 流行病学;传染病学 9，increased by a factor of 50 10，World Meteorological organization世界气象组织 11,remedy 处理方法; 疗法,药品; 纠正 no simple remedy for unemployment 失业问题没有简单的解决办法 a herbal remedy 草药 to remedy a problem 解决问题 12，hazard n危险；v冒失提出，冒险猜测；（to make a suggestion or guess which you know may be wrong）冒…的风险 a fire/safety hazard 火灾 / 安全隐患 Would you like to hazard a guess ? 你想猜猜看吗？ hazard other people's lives as well as their own 拿他人和自己的生命冒险 make teaching one's career 以教书为生 provide against… 防备放生某事 "有关增加的英文表述" （1）increase， rise，grow up,beef up等词，当表示"激增、猛增、大幅增加"时，还有像 surge，soar，mount，climb，proliferate等表达方式** （2） 例句：Alibaba is also planning to **beef up ** what it calls "ET Medical Brain"加强 As such deals **proliferated** , economists studied their impact.随着这类协定的激增、 its quarterly results included a **surge ** in revenues of 15%它的季报显示收入激增15% Business education is enjoying **a surge of** popularity in Ukraine 在乌克兰的受欢迎 程度激增 people with sight problems will **soar** in the coming decades有视力问题的人数将会激 增 As costs **skyrocket** 随着开销猛增 prices **skyrocket** by more than 2,000%"举行的英文表达" （1）hold,give,stage,host （2）be held [taken place] as scheduled 某事被"举行",用sth is held by sb 或者sth is taken place in someplace stage a strike 举行罢工 stage an uprising;举行起义 give a banquet 举行宴会
posts.author: Leo Schopen
